gold.rationale: 文本把可核验的信息（财联社提到的伊朗对以色列导弹袭击、以及伊朗革命卫队称对科威特美军基地的无人机行动）与未经证实的“伊朗油气核心设施遭精准打击并全国停摆/出口暂停”强绑定，并用模糊来源与夸张后果构建“链式承压”的确定性叙事；同时关键配图存在明显的后期字幕重制/水印叠加与“时间地点指向”问题，导致读者被引向与图片真实语义、真实语境不一致的结论，因此整体为 Mostly False。

atoms: Nighttime photo of a large industrial refinery complex engulfed in massive fire and thick black smoke.
Multiple large cylindrical storage tanks are visible, with several on fire.
Bright orange flames and sparks are erupting from the left side of the facility.
Fire trucks with flashing red lights are visible in the foreground.
Text overlay in the bottom left corner reads: 'IRAN | 2026/03/21 | 现场画面' and '疑似炼厂罐区起火'.
The scene depicts a severe industrial fire at night.
Aerial daytime view of a massive industrial complex, likely a petrochemical plant.
Hundreds of large white and brown cylindrical storage tanks are arranged in rows.
Extensive networks of pipes, towers, and processing units cover the ground.
The facility appears intact and operational under daylight.
Silhouette of a large oil pump jack (nodding donkey) in the foreground.
The sun is setting or rising in the background, creating a silhouette effect.
A distant industrial skyline with smokestacks is visible on the horizon.
The sky transitions from blue to orange near the horizon.
Grainy, low-resolution video footage showing a missile or rocket in flight at night.
The projectile is leaving a bright trail of fire and smoke.
White timestamp text in the top left corner reads: '03-21 01:17'.
White text overlay at the bottom reads: '伊朗南部上空拦截画面' (Interception footage over southern Iran).
The background shows a dark, arid landscape.
A screenshot of a social media post or news article with Arabic text.
The top section features a quote attributed to '美国国家情报总监' (US Director of National Intelligence) in a pink box.
The text discusses the stability and exhaustion of the Iranian regime.
The bottom section contains a photo of a burning industrial facility at night.
A blue banner at the very bottom contains Chinese text: '情报界：伊朗关键能源节点受冲击，局势进入不确定阶段'.
A cityscape with various buildings under a heavy, dark grey storm cloud.
The sky is completely overcast with ominous-looking clouds.
Snow-capped mountains are faintly visible in the far distance on the left.
The lighting is dim and gloomy, suggesting an approaching storm.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A dramatic night shot of a burning industrial refinery with massive plumes of black smoke rising into the sky. Fire trucks are present in the foreground, and the text overlay indicates the date is 2026/03/21 and the location is Iran.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: IRAN | 2026/03/21 | 现场画面 疑似炼厂罐区起火
visible_overlays_annotations: Text overlay: '疑似炼厂罐区起火'
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The text claims the date is 2026, which is in the future relative to the current real-world date, suggesting potential fabrication or a hypothetical scenario.

image_2 is used to illustrate the general layout of an Iranian oil refinery complex.
image_3 is offered as a silhouette of an oil pumpjack representing upstream extraction.
image_4 is captioned as interception footage of missiles in the southern sky on March 21st.
image_5 is used to support the claim that the US Director of National Intelligence stated the Iranian regime is exhausted.
image_6 is used to depict the dark, stormy weather conditions over a city.
the post uses image_1 to support its numerical claim of the specific timestamp 01:12 for the fire.

retrieved_evidence.text:
🔻美国国家情报总监图尔西·加巴德：“伊朗政权目前尚能维持，但其状况已严重恶化。”
🔻图尔西你也有脸出来吗？肯特都辞职了，你为什么不跟？
🔻via aljanews、CBS
#伊朗总统证实情报部长遇害##伊朗石油工业设施遭袭##海外新鲜事##中东现场直击# ​​​
伊朗境内靠近波斯湾和霍尔木兹海峡一带分布着阿巴丹、布什尔等大型炼油厂和油港设施，储罐区在夜间一旦发生爆炸起火，往往会形成大范围火光和浓烟，从远处即可辨识。近日有报道援引伊朗能源部门和地方官员说法称，部分核心油气设施曾遭受疑似空袭打击，引发储罐及管线燃烧，消防和军方力量在夜间持续展开灭火与封锁工作，引起外界对伊朗全国能源系统安全性的高度关注。
美国情报界和政策圈长期关注伊朗政权稳定性与能源设施安全状况，华盛顿主流媒体的访谈节目经常邀请前情报官员、智库学者或前官员出镜分析局势。根据近期公开言论，这些人士多从油气出口受阻、货币贬值和国内抗议等角度，评估伊朗在遭遇关键能源设施遇袭后的承压能力。有评论指出，一旦伊朗因战事被迫宣布油气出口暂停，国内财政收入和社会稳定将同步承压，这也会为美国及其盟友的地区政策带来新的变量。
在地区局势升温的背景下，美国国内围绕伊朗政局与安全风险的舆论讨论也在近期有所增多。据社交平台信息显示，署名“包容万物恒河水”的账号近日援引美国国家情报总监图尔西·加巴德对伊朗政权状况的评论内容，认为应密切关注伊朗内部政治走向及其对地区政策的可能影响。有分析指出，这类言论更多反映了情报与政策圈的观点取向，被部分观察人士用作评估相关国家决策逻辑的参考，而非直接用于判断战场态势。
近年来中东多次爆发牵涉以色列和伊朗的远程打击事件，空中拦截与导弹尾焰常被提及，用以说明双方在防空导弹与巡航导弹领域的军备水平。军事专家介绍，在伊朗本土上空，一旦雷达发现可疑飞行物，地对空导弹系统会迅速发射拦截弹，夜空中形成沿轨迹延伸的火点和亮线。而在支持以色列精准打击说法的报道中，远程导弹或无人机突破伊朗防空、进入伊朗领空的情形被反复讨论，显示这一地区空天安全形势愈发复杂。
联合国安理会、欧盟外长理事会以及海湾合作委员会近日频繁就以色列和伊朗之间的紧张局势召开会议，呼吁各方避免进一步攻击能源基础设施。外交文件中多次强调，伊朗石油工业的系统性瘫痪不仅会打击本国经济，还将通过油价暴涨波及全球粮食和运输成本，给发展中国家带来额外压力。多国代表认为，保护跨境能源设施安全、防止战火殃及关键油气设施，应成为各方在危机管控和停火谈判中优先考虑的议题。
据区域安全观察人士近日转引市场资讯终端与社交平台滚动消息称，本月初有报道指伊朗方面对以色列本土目标发动新一轮导弹打击，同时有信息提及驻科威特附近的美军设施遭到无人机或导弹行动骚扰。相关报道认为，此类迹象被部分分析人士视作中东紧张局势升级的写照，但对袭击的具体坐标、命中程度及实际损失，各方说法存在差异，相关官方机构尚未就所有细节给出统一说明。

能源研究机构人士近日在接受当地媒体采访时指出，在当前地区紧张形势下，伊朗石油产业的重要性再度受到外界关注。专家介绍，伊朗境内的炼油与石化设施、沿海油港以及向内陆扩展的输油管线，与本国电力系统和工业体系高度耦合，其运行状况被视为国家经济稳定的关键因素之一。分析人士称，一旦霍尔木兹海峡航运出现受阻风险，市场往往会提前反应，交易情绪可能出现波动，国际原油价格和相关资产的预期亦会随之调整，具体影响程度则取决于事态持续时间和范围。
本月初，中东地区围绕伊朗、以色列以及驻中东美军基地的军事对峙局势再度升温。多家区域媒体与金融资讯平台在3月2日至3月3日期间密集发布相关讯息，据报道提及“新一轮导弹及无人机袭击”“真实承诺-4行动”以及“第13轮攻击”等表述。消息人士称，这些说法多出自伊朗及其盟友媒体、以色列方面通报以及美方渠道的交叉信息，目前对各方采取行动的时间顺序及具体规模仍在梳理之中。
伊朗国家石油公司和国家天然气公司掌控着全国油气生产与管网运营，其下属炼油厂、石化园区和输油管道构成庞大的能源体系。研究机构指出，这一体系高度依赖少数干线和枢纽设施，具有规模经济的同时也存在集中风险。假如核心炼化装置和输油中枢遭遇精确打击或大面积故障，可能在短时间内导致全国性供应受扰，需要动用战略储备和跨区域调配，而国际市场会迅速透过期货和现货价格反映这种潜在短缺。
波斯湾沿岸的伊朗南部油港，如阿萨卢耶、霍尔木兹甘一带油码头，是伊朗原油和液化天然气出口的重要通道，长栈桥与装卸臂用于与大型油轮对接，实现装船和卸载作业。航运机构指出，一旦以色列与伊朗局势紧张并涉及港口附近的军事打击，保险费率和风险溢价会显著上升，部分船舶可能改道绕行或暂缓靠泊，导致装船计划推迟，进而加剧国际原油价格波动，对依赖中东能源的多国经济产生连锁反应。
伊朗石油工业高度集中在几处关键炼化基地，这些设施通常由高耸的蒸馏塔、复杂的管廊和成片的储油罐构成，是原油加工和成品油供应的枢纽。根据能源行业资料和卫星监测分析，这类炼厂一旦因军事打击或技术事故停摆，不仅会影响国内燃料供应，还会波及伊朗的油气出口能力。在有关以色列精准空袭的讨论中，阿巴丹炼油厂等大型装置经常被视为潜在脆弱节点，被纳入各类风险评估模型之中。
区域外交渠道人士近日表示，围绕近期针对以色列目标以及驻中东美军基地的多起导弹和无人机行动，各方公开表述仍呈现复杂局面。据介绍，不同政府机构、武装派别发言人以及地方媒体对于袭击对象、发生地点和造成损失的描述并不完全一致，部分数字和细节差距较大。一些安全分析人士据此认为，目前信息环境较为混乱，外界对事件全貌的掌握仍依赖多来源交叉比对，后续仍需关注各国防务部门及国际组织可能发布的进一步通报。

#伊朗发起第13轮攻击#【#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#（十）：美特使披露对伊动武前谈判破裂细节 以军地面部队进入黎巴嫩】伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队公共关系部当地时间3月3日宣布，其海军无人机部队对位于科威特的“阿里夫詹”美军基地发起了“真实承诺-4”行动的第13轮攻击。#越来越多国家被卷入中东冲突# 

17:53: ​​​

#多架美军战机坠毁#【#以色列宣布袭击伊朗#（九）：科威特称多架美国战机坠毁 伊朗称其击落美国F-15战机】据报道，伊朗向美国基地发射新一轮导弹和无人机袭击。

23:44:08——【伊朗向以色列本土发动新一轮导弹袭击】财联社3月2日电，伊朗宣布向以色列本土发动新一轮导弹袭击。以色列国防军称，伊朗弹 ​​​
在以色列与伊朗持续角力的背景下，海湾地区其他产油国如沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋和卡塔尔也密切关注局势，与欧美石油公司保持沟通。OPEC及OPEC+框架下的成员国需要综合评估伊朗出口变动对全球供需平衡的影响，再决定是否调整产量配额。能源政策分析人士表示，如果伊朗出口长期受阻，而其他产油国未能及时弥补缺口，布伦特和WTI基准油价可能持续高位，进而推高全球通胀压力，加剧主要消费国的宏观经济挑战。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post presents a coherent narrative of attacks on March 2-3, 2024, but the provided evidence and image descriptions contain conflicting dates (March 21, 2026) and specific details that contradict the post's timeline and claims.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post claims the events occurred on March 2-3, 2024, but Image 1 explicitly displays a date of '2026/03/21' and Image 4 displays '03-21', indicating the visual evidence is from a future date or a different event entirely.
t3_problematic_subclaims: Post claims events happened on March 2-3, 2024, while images show dates of March 21, 2026.
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text describes the images as depicting fires at Abadan and Bushehr refineries on March 2-3, but Image 1 shows a date of '2026/03/21' and Image 4 shows a missile interception timestamp of '03-21 01:17', creating a temporal mismatch between the text's narrative and the image metadata.
c1_problematic_subclaims: Post claims images show fires on March 2-3, 2024, but images contain OCR text stating the date is 2026/03/21.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is unreliable because it constructs a detailed narrative about March 2024 events while using visual evidence that is temporally inconsistent (dated 2026) and potentially from a different event.

images.scene_description: A night scene of an industrial refinery complex with massive fires engulfing storage tanks and emitting thick black smoke. Firefighters and emergency vehicles are visible in the foreground.
images.ocr_text: IRAN | 2026/03/21 | 现场画面 疑似炼厂罐区起火
images.c_evidence: The image text claims the date is '2026/03/21', but the ground-truth evidence describes the event occurring on 'March 2nd to March 3rd' (3月2日至3月3日).
images.explanation: The image is a genuine photo of a refinery fire, but the text overlay contains a future date (2026) that contradicts the historical context provided in the evidence (March 2025).

images.scene_description: An aerial daytime view of a massive oil refinery complex with numerous storage tanks, distillation columns, and extensive piping infrastructure.
images.explanation: A clean, unedited aerial photograph of a refinery complex consistent with the background context of the post.

images.scene_description: Grainy night footage showing two missile trails streaking across the sky and exploding, with a timestamp '03-21 01:17' in the corner.
images.ocr_text: 03-21 01:17 伊朗南部上空拦截画面
images.explanation: A genuine, unedited surveillance video frame showing missile interception consistent with the post's claim.

images.scene_description: A screenshot of a social media post or article containing Arabic and Chinese text. The text discusses the US Director of National Intelligence's assessment of the Iranian regime. The background image within the post shows a refinery fire at night.
images.ocr_text: 美国国家情报总监：伊朗政权稳固但已疲惫不堪 伊朗政权稳固，但我们的军事行动已使其极度疲惫。 伊朗及其代理人仍能攻击我们在该地区的利益和盟友。 情报界：伊朗关键能源节点受冲击，局势进入不确定阶段
images.explanation: A screenshot of a news report consistent with the post's claim about US intelligence assessments.

images.scene_description: A cityscape with buildings under a very dark, ominous grey sky, suggesting a storm or heavy cloud cover.
images.explanation: A clean, unedited photo of a city under stormy skies consistent with the post's description.

judge.level3_rationale: 该帖文声称事件发生在2024年3月，但图片1上明确标注的日期为'2026/03/21'，导致图文在时间语境上存在严重错置，使得关于2024年事件的描述与视觉证据不符。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post text claims the date is 2024, but the image overlay shows 2026. This is a T3 (Misleading Context) and C2 (Contextual Inconsistency) issue. Since the text's core claim (2024) is contradicted by the image's explicit date (2026), the post is misleading. However, since the text is not entirely fabricated (it describes a real type of event), it falls into Mostly False rather than False.
judge.core_claim: The post claims that on March 2-3, 2024, Iran's key oil and gas facilities were targeted, causing fires and disrupting energy exports, supported by images of the incident.
key_subclaims: Image 1 shows the Abadan refinery fire on March 3rd at 01:12.
Image 4 shows missile interception footage from March 21st.
The US Director of National Intelligence stated the Iranian regime is exhausted.
The images depict the specific fire scenes mentioned in the text.

subclaim_findings.note: The post text claims the date is 2024, but the evidence and image overlays explicitly state 2026.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 1 shows the Abadan refinery fire on March 3rd at 01:12.
subclaim_findings.note: The image overlay clearly reads '2026/03/21', contradicting the text's claim of 2024.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: Image 4 shows missile interception footage from March 21st.
subclaim_findings.note: The image timestamp '03-21 01:17' matches the date in the post text.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The US Director of National Intelligence stated the Iranian regime is exhausted.
subclaim_findings.note: The quote is attributed to Tulsi Gabbard in the text, but the image shows a generic 'US Director of National Intelligence' box, creating a slight attribution mismatch.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The images depict the specific fire scenes mentioned in the text.
subclaim_findings.note: The text claims the fire is from March 2024, but the image is dated March 2026, placing the visual evidence in a future context relative to the text.

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post claims events occurred in 2024, but Image 1 explicitly displays a date of '2026/03/21', creating a severe temporal mismatch (T3). This places the visual evidence in a future context relative to the text, making the core claim of the event happening in 2024 factually incorrect based on the provided visual evidence. The mismatch is substantial enough to disqualify 'Mostly True' or 'True'.

image_findings.explanation: The image displays a date of '2026/03/21', which contradicts the post's claim of events occurring in 2024, creating a severe temporal mismatch.
The image shows a generic refinery complex consistent with the description of Iranian oil facilities.
The image shows an oil pumpjack, consistent with the description of upstream extraction facilities.
The image shows missile interception with a timestamp of '03-21', matching the post's date.
The image shows a composite of text and a burning refinery, consistent with the post's narrative.
The image shows a cityscape under storm clouds, consistent with the description of ominous weather.
